title: SimpleFlight
body:
# A simple /fly plugin
## Features:
/fly [<Online Player>]:
Toggles flight for targetted player, if no argument is provided, toggles flight for command sender
## Permissions:
simpleFlight.fly:

Allows player to do /fly without any arguments,

simpleFlight.fly.others:

Allows player to do /fly, aswell as /fly [<Online Player>]
